title: Suck
description: Whenever this creature deals unblocked attack damage, it gains [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
smart_description: Whenever [gold]the owner[/gold] deals unblocked attack damage, it gains [blue]Strength[/blue] equal to the current stack amount.
notes: Each unblocked hit applies Strength to the owner. The amount of Strength gained per hit equals this power's current stack count.
